nl_prompt: What was total gross revenue last quarter?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(orders.line_value) AS total_gross_revenue 
FROM orders 
WHERE order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('quarter', NOW()) - INTERVAL '3 months' 
  AND order_date < DATE_TRUNC('quarter', NOW())

nl_prompt: How many orders were placed this year?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(orders.id) AS order_count 
FROM orders 
WHERE YEAR(order_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)

nl_prompt: What is our average order value?
generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(line_value) AS average_order_value 
FROM orders

nl_prompt: How many unique customers made a purchase in the last 6 months?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) AS CustomerCount 
FROM orders 
WHERE order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)
error_message:
{'error': 'Max retries (2) exceeded', 'last_error': 'Catalog Error: Scalar Function with name curdate does not exist!
Did you mean "current_date"?

LINE 3: WHERE order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)
                                     ^'}

nl_prompt: What is the total number of products in our catalog?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalProducts 
FROM products

nl_prompt: What was our highest single-order revenue ever?
generated_sql:
SELECT MAX(line_value) AS max_revenue 
FROM orders

nl_prompt: How many orders were cancelled this year?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(orders.id) AS order_count 
FROM orders 
WHERE YEAR(order_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) AND status = 'cancelled'

nl_prompt: What is our total revenue for Electronics products?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(orders.line_value) AS total_revenue 
FROM orders 
JOIN products ON orders.product_id = products.id 
WHERE products.category = 'Electronics'

nl_prompt: How many orders shipped in the last 30 days?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS OrderCount 
FROM orders 
WHERE ship_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
error_message:
{'error': 'Max retries (2) exceeded', 'last_error': 'Catalog Error: Scalar Function with name curdate does not exist!
Did you mean "current_date"?

LINE 3: WHERE ship_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
                                    ^'}

nl_prompt: What is the revenue for the top-selling product?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(orders.line_value) AS total_revenue, products.name AS product_name 
FROM orders 
JOIN order_items ON orders.id = order_items.order_id 
JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id 
GROUP BY products.name 
ORDER BY SUM(orders.line_value) DESC 
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: How many new customers signed up this year?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customers.id) AS CustomerCount 
FROM customers 
WHERE YEAR(created_at) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE)

nl_prompt: What is our total cost of goods sold this year?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(products.cost_price * orders.quantity) AS COGS 
FROM order_items 
JOIN orders ON order_items.order_id = orders.id 
JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id 
WHERE orders.order_date >= '2023-01-01' AND orders.order_date <= '2023-12-31'

nl_prompt: What percentage of orders were returned?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS ReturnRate
FROM orders

nl_prompt: How many distinct product categories do we sell?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT category) AS DistinctProductCategories 
FROM products

nl_prompt: What was our total revenue last year?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(orders.line_value) AS total_revenue 
FROM orders 
WHERE YEAR(orders.order_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year')

nl_prompt: What is the revenue breakdown by product category?
generated_sql:
SELECT products.category, SUM(orders.line_value) AS total_revenue 
FROM orders 
JOIN order_items ON orders.id = order_items.order_id 
JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id 
GROUP BY products.category

nl_prompt: Which customers placed more than 5 orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count 
FROM orders 
GROUP BY customer_id 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5

nl_prompt: Who are our top 10 customers by lifetime revenue?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name AS customer_name, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue 
FROM orders o 
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id 
GROUP BY c.name 
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC 
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: What is the average days between order and shipment per product category?
generated_sql:
SELECT products.category, AVG(logistics_deliveries.delivery_date - orders.order_date) AS avg_days_between_order_and_shipment
FROM orders 
JOIN logistics_deliveries ON orders.shipping_id = logistics_deliveries.shipping_ref
JOIN order_items ON orders.id = order_items.order_id
JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id
GROUP BY products.category

nl_prompt: Which product categories have more than 10 percent return rate?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(o.id) AS ReturnRate
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.category
HAVING ReturnRate > 10

nl_prompt: What is the revenue per customer segment?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.segment, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue 
FROM orders o 
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id 
GROUP BY c.segment

nl_prompt: Which sales rep closed the most orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT s.rep_name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count 
FROM sales_reps s 
JOIN orders o ON s.id = o.sales_rep_id 
GROUP BY s.rep_name 
ORDER BY order_count DESC 
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What is the monthly revenue trend for the last 12 months?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(orders.line_value) AS revenue, DATE_TRUNC('month', orders.order_date) AS month 
FROM orders 
GROUP BY month 
ORDER BY month DESC 
LIMIT 12

nl_prompt: Which products had zero orders in the last 60 days?
generated_sql:
SELECT product_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count 
FROM orders 
WHERE status = 'placed' AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 60 DAY) 
GROUP BY product_id 
HAVING order_count = 0
error_message:
{'error': 'Max retries (2) exceeded', 'last_error': 'Catalog Error: Scalar Function with name curdate does not exist!
Did you mean "current_date"?

LINE 3: WHERE status = 'placed' AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 60 DAY) 
                                                           ^'}

nl_prompt: What is the average order value per customer segment?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.segment, AVG(o.line_value) AS average_order_value 
FROM orders o 
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id 
GROUP BY c.segment

nl_prompt: What is the revenue from completed orders versus pending orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN line_value ELSE 0 END) AS completed_revenue,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN line_value ELSE 0 END) AS pending_revenue
FROM orders

nl_prompt: Which product has the highest total quantity sold?
generated_sql:
SELECT product_id, SUM(quantity) AS TotalQuantitySold 
FROM order_items 
GROUP BY product_id 
ORDER BY TotalQuantitySold DESC 
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: What is the total discount given across all orders?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(line_value) AS total_discount
FROM orders

nl_prompt: What is the average number of items per order by category?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, AVG(oi.quantity) AS avg_items_per_order
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.category

nl_prompt: What percentage of revenue comes from our top 20 percent of customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(o.line_value) * 100 / (SELECT SUM(line_value) FROM orders) AS top_20_percent_revenue_percentage
FROM (
    SELECT customer_id, SUM(line_value) AS total_revenue
    FROM orders
    GROUP BY customer_id
    ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
    LIMIT (SELECT COUNT(*) * 0.2 FROM orders)
) AS top_customers
JOIN orders o ON top_customers.customer_id = o.customer_id

nl_prompt: Which customers with active CRM deals had delivery issues?
generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.name AS customer_name, d.delivery_date, dl.expected_date
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN sf_opportunities so ON c.email_address = so.account_email AND c.account_id = so.account_id
LEFT JOIN logistics_deliveries dl ON o.shipping_id = dl.shipping_ref
WHERE so.stage IN ('Prospecting', 'Qualification', 'Needs Analysis', 'Proposal/Quote', 'Negotiation', 'Closed Won')
  AND dl.status_code IS NULL OR dl.status_code != 100
error_message:
{'error': 'Max retries (2) exceeded', 'last_error': 'Binder Error: Table "c" does not have a column named "email_address"

Candidate bindings: : "email"

LINE 4: JOIN sf_opportunities so ON c.email_address = so.account_email AND c.account_id = so...
                                    ^'}

nl_prompt: What is the average deal size for customers whose deliveries were delayed?
generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(o.line_value) AS average_order_value 
FROM orders o 
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id 
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM logistics_deliveries ld 
    WHERE ld.shipping_ref = o.shipping_id AND ld.delivery_date - ld.expected_date > 0
)
GROUP BY c.segment

nl_prompt: Which of our top 10 revenue customers have an open CRM opportunity?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name AS customer_name, SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
JOIN sf_opportunities so ON c.email = so.account_email_address AND so.stage != 'Closed Won'
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10
error_message:
{'error': 'Max retries (2) exceeded', 'last_error': 'Binder Error: Table "so" does not have a column named "account_email_address"

Candidate bindings: : "account_id"

LINE 4: JOIN sf_opportunities so ON c.email = so.account_email_address AND so.stage != 'Closed Won'
                                              ^'}

nl_prompt: What is the delivery success rate for Enterprise segment customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN ld.status_code = 2 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS DeliverySuccessRate
FROM orders o 
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id 
JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.shipping_ref 
WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise'

nl_prompt: Total revenue from customers whose CRM deals closed successfully?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(o.line_value) AS total_revenue 
FROM orders o 
JOIN sf_opportunities so ON o.id = so.opp_id 
WHERE so.stage = 'Closed Won'

nl_prompt: Which customers have both high order value and a delayed shipment?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.id AS customer_id
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id
WHERE o.line_value > (SELECT AVG(line_value) FROM orders)
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM logistics_deliveries ld 
    WHERE ld.shipping_ref = o.shipping_id AND ld.delivery_date - ld.expected_date > 0
  )
LIMIT 1000

nl_prompt: What is the on-time delivery rate by CRM deal stage?
generated_sql:
SELECT o.stage, COUNT(CASE WHEN ld.status_code = 2 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS OnTimeDeliveryRate
FROM orders o 
JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.shipping_ref
JOIN sf_opportunities op ON o.deal_id = op.opp_id
GROUP BY o.stage
error_message:
{'error': 'Max retries (2) exceeded', 'last_error': 'Binder Error: Table "o" does not have a column named "deal_id"

Candidate bindings: : "id"

LINE 4: JOIN sf_opportunities op ON o.deal_id = op.opp_id
                                    ^'}

nl_prompt: Which product categories have delivery complaints from high-value CRM accounts?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, COUNT(ld.status_code) AS complaint_count
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.shipping_ref
JOIN sf_accounts sa ON o.customer_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM sf_opportunities WHERE amount > 10000)
WHERE ld.status_code != 200 -- Assuming 200 is the status code for successful delivery
GROUP BY p.category
HAVING complaint_count > 0

nl_prompt: What is the average time from CRM deal close to first order?
generated_sql:
SELECT AVG(o1.close_date - o2.order_date) AS avg_time_from_close_to_first_order
FROM sf_opportunities o1
JOIN orders o2 ON o1.customer_id = o2.customer_id AND o1.opp_id = o2.opp_id
WHERE o2.order_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY o1.close_date
error_message:
{'error': 'Max retries (2) exceeded', 'last_error': 'Binder Error: Table "o1" does not have a column named "customer_id"

Candidate bindings: : "account_id"

LINE 3: JOIN orders o2 ON o1.customer_id = o2.customer_id AND o1.opp_id = o2.opp_id
                          ^'}

nl_prompt: Which logistics carrier has the worst on-time rate for top revenue customers?
generated_sql:
SELECT ld.carrier_name, COUNT(CASE WHEN ld.delivery_date - ld.expected_date > 0 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / COUNT(*) * 100 AS OnTimeRate
FROM orders o 
JOIN logistics_deliveries ld ON o.shipping_id = ld.shipping_ref 
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id 
WHERE o.line_value > (SELECT AVG(line_value) FROM orders)
GROUP BY ld.carrier_name
ORDER BY OnTimeRate DESC
LIMIT 1

nl_prompt: Summarize delivery complaint themes for top 10 revenue customers.
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name AS customer_name, COUNT(r.id) AS complaint_count 
FROM orders o 
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id 
LEFT JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id 
WHERE o.line_value > (SELECT AVG(line_value) FROM orders) 
GROUP BY c.name 
ORDER BY complaint_count DESC 
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: Which product categories have the most negative sentiment?
generated_sql:
SELECT p.category, SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(o.id) AS ReturnRate
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id
JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.category
HAVING ReturnRate > 10

nl_prompt: What common complaints appear for delayed shipments?
generated_sql:
SELECT r.reason AS complaint_reason, COUNT(r.id) AS complaint_count 
FROM orders o 
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id 
LEFT JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id 
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM logistics_deliveries ld 
    WHERE ld.shipping_ref = o.shipping_id AND ld.delivery_date - ld.expected_date > 0
)
GROUP BY r.reason 
ORDER BY complaint_count DESC

nl_prompt: Find customers who mentioned competitors in support.
generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.name AS customer_name
FROM orders o
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id
WHERE o.subject LIKE '%competitors%'
error_message:
{'error': 'Max retries (2) exceeded', 'last_error': 'Binder Error: Table "o" does not have a column named "subject"

nl_prompt: What were top 3 reasons for returns?
generated_sql:
SELECT reason, COUNT(*) AS return_count
FROM returns
GROUP BY reason
ORDER BY return_count DESC
LIMIT 3

nl_prompt: Which sales reps have customers with most positive feedback?
generated_sql:
SELECT s.rep_name, COUNT(c.id) AS customer_count 
FROM sales_reps s 
JOIN orders o ON s.id = o.sales_rep_id 
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id 
GROUP BY s.rep_name 
ORDER BY customer_count DESC 
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: Summarize key themes for Enterprise segment accounts.
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name AS customer_name, COUNT(r.id) AS complaint_count 
FROM orders o 
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id 
LEFT JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id 
WHERE c.segment = 'Enterprise' AND o.line_value > (SELECT AVG(line_value) FROM orders) 
GROUP BY c.name 
ORDER BY complaint_count DESC 
LIMIT 10

nl_prompt: Which logistics partners have most damaged goods complaints?
generated_sql:
SELECT ld.delivery_partner, COUNT(*) AS complaint_count 
FROM orders o 
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id 
LEFT JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id 
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM logistics_deliveries ld 
    WHERE ld.shipping_ref = o.shipping_id AND ld.status_code = 4
)
GROUP BY ld.delivery_partner 
ORDER BY complaint_count DESC
error_message:
{'error': 'Max retries (2) exceeded', 'last_error': 'Binder Error: Referenced table "ld" not found!
Candidate tables: "c"

LINE 10: GROUP BY ld.delivery_partner 
                  ^'}

nl_prompt: What do churned customers say were top reasons for leaving?
generated_sql:
SELECT c.name AS customer_name, r.reason AS reason_for_leaving 
FROM orders o 
JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id 
LEFT JOIN returns r ON o.id = r.order_id 
WHERE o.status = 'Cancelled' AND r.return_date IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY c.name, r.reason 
ORDER BY COUNT(r.id) DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS OrderCount 
FROM orders 
WHERE complaints LIKE '%defect%'
